region_metrics.target_text_sample: AIA founder Mr. Starr Mr. Cornelius Vander Starr established a company in Shanghai as an insurance agency, laying the Gr
Mr. Starr founded in Shanghai his first life insurance business, Asia Life Insurance Company。
Mr. Starr founded in Shanghai a company called International Assurance Company, Limited (INTASCO).
INTASCO established branches in Hong Kong and Singapore.
Founded The in the Philippines Philippine American Life and General Insurance Company (Philam Life)。
INTASCO moved its headquarters to Hong Kong.
INTASCO was renamed American International Assurance Company, Limited。
Through our Shanghai branch we resumed business in China, becoming the first licensed foreign life insurer in China.
We celebrated our return to our original headquarters building on the Bund in Shanghai.
We completed the restructuring caused by AIG's financial crisis in 2008, which laid the foundation for the Company's lis
AIA Group Limited successfully listed on the Main Board of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited, then the world's thi
AIA Group Limited became a constituent of the Hang Seng Index.
We established a sponsored Level 1 American Depositary Receipt programme.
AIA completed the full integration with ING's Malaysian operations integration.
Through the acquisition of Aviva NDB Insurance, we began operations in Sri Lanka.
AIA and Citibank entered into a significant exclusive long-term bancassurance partnership covering 11 markets across Asi
AIA became Tottenham Hotspur Football Club's official shirt partner, promoting sport as an important part of healthy liv
AIA's Million Dollar Round Table membership became the largest in the world.
Opened AIA in Bangkok Leadership Centre。
AIA increased its stake in the Indian joint venture Tata AIA Life Insurance Company Limited, from 26% to 49%.
AIA presents the Hong Kong Observation Wheel and AIA Vitality Park.
AIA launched a new brand promise: Healthier, Longer, Better Lives.
Since 1919 committed to advancing Asia's economic and social development
